steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: basic-policy
spec:
  rules:
    - name: test
      match:
        any:
          - resources:
              kinds:
                - Pod
      generate:
        foreach:
        - list: "request.object.spec.containers"
          generateResources:
          - kind: ConfigMap
            apiVersion: v1
            name: "custom-created-configmap"
            namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"
     
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/kyverno/kyverno/pull/4386. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
## Explanation

Extends foreach to cover generate rules.

## Related issue

## Milestone of this PR
Done 👍🏽 

## Proposed Changes

After merging this PR, A single "trigger" resource will result in the creation of multiple downstream resources for an example Creation of a pod could result in generation of multiple configMap.

### Proof Manifests

If the pollicy given below is applied then multiple configMap will get created on the creation of a pod:

```yaml
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: basic-policy2
spec:
  rules:
  - name: test-foreach-generate
    match:
      any:
      - resources:
          kinds:
          - Pod
    generate:
      foreach:
      - list: "request.object.spec.containers"
        kind: ConfigMap
        apiVersion: v1
        name: "custom-created-configmap"
        namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"
        synchronize: false
        data:
          data:
            foo: "bar is my container name"
      - list: "request.object.spec.containers"
        kind: ConfigMap
        apiVersion: v1
        name: "{{element.name}}-config"
        namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"
        synchronize: false
        data:
          data:
            foo: "{{element.name}} is my container name"
      - list: "request.object.spec.containers"
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: ConfigMap
        name: "foreachgen-test"
        namespace: "default
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: basic-policy
spec:
  rules:
    - name: test
      match:
        any:
          - resources:
              kinds:
                - Pod
      generate:
        foreach:
        - list: "request.object.spec.containers"
          generateResources:
          - kind: ConfigMap
            apiVersion: v1
            name: "custom-created-configmap"
            namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"

apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: basic-policy
spec:
  rules:
    - name: test
      match:
        any:
          - resources:
              kinds:
                - Pod
      generate:
        foreach:
        - list: "request.object.spec.containers"
          generateResources:
          - kind: ConfigMap
            apiVersion: v1
            name: "custom-created-configmap"
            namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"
            synchronize: false
            data:
              data:
                foo: "{{element.name}} is my container name"
          - kind: Secret
            apiVersion: v1
            name: "custom-created-secret"
            namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"
            synchronize: false
            data:
              data:
                extra: YmFyCg==

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: static-web
  labels:
    role: myrole
spec:
  containers:
    - name: web
      image: nginx
      ports:
        - name: web
          containerPort: 80
          protocol: TCP

apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: basic-policy-cloned
spec:
  rules:
    - name: test
      match:
        any:
          - resources:
              kinds:
                - Pod
      generate:
        foreach:
        - list: "request.object.spec.containers"
          generateResources:
          - kind: ConfigMap
            apiVersion: v1
            name: "{{element.name}}"
            namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"
            synchronize: false
            clone:
              namespace: default
              name: custom-created-configmap
          - kind: Secret
            apiVersion: v1
            name: "custom-created-secret-1"
            namespace: "{{request.object.metadata.namespace}}"
            synchronize: false
            clone:
              namespace: default
              name: custom-created-secret

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: roles-dictionary
  namespace: default
data:
  allowed-roles: "[\"cluster-admin\", \"cluster-operator\", \"tenant-admin\"]"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kyverno installed or the issue environment reproducible.
